siteDescription: Software Engineer building production backends, APIs, RAG pipelines, and agentic AI systems.
roleTagline: Backend & AI Systems · Node.js · TypeScript · Python · RAG Pipelines & Agentic AI Workflows

hireMe.headline: Available for software engineering, backend, and production LLM system roles
hireMe.summary: Software Engineer specializing in production backends and applied AI systems. I help teams ship production-grade APIs, RAG pipelines, agentic workflows, and scalable cloud infrastructure, from architecture and implementation through deployment and maintenance.

services.title: Backend & API Engineering
services.description: REST/gRPC APIs, microservices, and event-driven systems with Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Redis, and secure authentication.

services.title: AI & LLM Systems
services.description: RAG pipelines, semantic search, multi-agent workflows, prompt engineering, and vector databases with LangChain, OpenAI, and Python.

services.title: Cloud & DevOps
services.description: AWS infrastructure, Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, monitoring, and security best practices.
